message:
fix(generator): use extensionless imports for manifest-web-index.ts

Next.js with Turbopack and moduleResolution: "bundler" requires extensionless
imports. The generator was outputting '.js' extensions which caused build
failures:

  Module not found: Can't resolve './manifest-tools.js'

Changed to extensionless imports to match codebase convention:
- './manifest-tools.js' → './manifest-tools'
- './manifest-tldr.js' → './manifest-tldr'
- './manifest-commands.js' → './manifest-commands'
- './manifest-lessons-index.js' → './manifest-lessons-index'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
